feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: When destiny gives you second chances
entry.summary:
Author: justs0me_randomauth0r

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,809Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Destiny plays a cruel game with us. It lets us hope, lets us believe we are in control, just for things to end the way we knew they would anyways. But sometimes, to it’s very favorites, destiny will be kind. One of those favorites is Merlin. And what if this time it will actually end differently? What if this time he would find a way to show Morgana that violence was not the only option? What if this time, he could help Mordred not loose his loyalty. What if this time he could be honest with this man earlier on? Share his secret with him and show what magic can also be. Show him the beauty and peace it can bring. And what if this time he could build the courage to tell Arthur how he truly felt, before it will be too late again? If he could do all those things, could the ending truly be changed? Could he watch Arthur be the king he was destined to be instead of watching the love of his life die in his arms without him ever truly knowing what he meant for the young warlock? Merlin wasn’t sure. Anything he had ever done to try and change the cause of events had led to the exact situations he tried to avoid. But if destiny gives you a chance like this, you use it. Even if it may just mean reliving your losses once again…

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 99,922Chapters: 18/20Kudos: 72

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it. Featuring pervasive passive aggression and a general sense of melancholy, an extended and distinctly non peaceful political process to legalising magic, a not entirely willing family trip to Ealdor, and some foreign diplomatic negotiations somewhat lacking in diplomacy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: If Things Were Different
entry.summary:
Author: PratWithAHeart

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,129Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 18

Summary: In a land of myth and a time of magic, the destiny of a great king and a free land rests on the shoulders of a young boy. This is a story where the young warlock can feel a dangerous presence lurking within the kingdom's walls, but such a threat has not yet been identified.A story where a recently rescued young woman befriends Merlin. The two share a gift which automatically binds them together as close allies. A bond that Merlin could never share with the Prince of Camelot.A story where both Merlin and Arthur discover their own feelings for each other.A story where two men are stupidly infatuated with the other, but neither notice how much they each stare at the other so longingly.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: i was all over him
entry.summary:
Author: I_shouldnt_be_given_this_power

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,757Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: Contains non-con though not explicit. After the Merlin saves Arthur from his wounds (end of season 5) he decided he will never allow another important person in his life to be so close to death again. For his own safety, Merlin locks Arthur in a tower deep in the forest, though this might hurt his King more than any blade.

entry.title: Strange Gravity
entry.summary:
Author: aeternus_diamant

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,031Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 10

Summary: Mordred has been quietly, devastatingly in love with Merlin since September — since a guest lecture on myth and memory where Merlin said something offhand and brilliant and Mordred's entire brain rearranged itself. He signed up for Merlin's tutorial section like a man with no self-preservation instincts. Merlin, PhD candidate and professional disaster, is completely oblivious. For now.

entry.title: a new day will follow, there’s always tomorrow
entry.summary:
Author: highfunctioningclotpole

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,210Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 42

Summary: Merlin wakes up to the same day over and over again.A spell gone wrong has trapped him in a loop that won’t break until he tells the truth “from the heart.” He tries everything—confessing his magic, admitting his feelings to himself—but nothing works.Because the truth isn’t meant for him.It’s meant for Arthur.

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,367Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The only thing I ever got from you
entry.summary:
Author: imscaredofspiders

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,732Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 4

Summary: From a very early age, Morgana was taught that magic was the purest form of evil, and that anyone who practised it should be beheaded. She never knew exactly why, but from all the rumors she overheared while living in Camelot painted a pretty interesting picture. Being raised a lady, she understood not to mention such things. Asking anybody about it- Lord forbid The King himself would completely destroy not only hers, but also her parents reputation. She could not afford to disrespect her parents like that, so she simply never brought it up.

entry.title: You and me, we've got (browser) history
entry.summary:
Author: liviapeleia

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,928Chapters: 29/?Kudos: 197

Summary: A season 1 canon divergent AU told through Reddit posts. Gaius and Uther are having a secret love affair. Somehow, Geoffrey might be involved. Arthur has more throwaway accounts than brain cells, Morgana is a SJW (affectionate), Gwen is the only sane person, and Merlin is absolutely not in love, no way, never. And how the hell does Kilgharrah's cave have WiFi?
